rationale: SPY ORB long signal triggered: close 709.39 broke above the opening range upper bound 709.11, giving a directional breakout read. Gap-fade and VWAP-reversion are both neutral (size 0), so they neither confirm nor contradict the ORB. QQQ and IWM signals are mixed/conflicting (gap-fade long vs. short), so SPY is the cleanest setup. Sizing at max_position_gbp 800 / 1.27 = ~$1016 USD, which at $709.39 yields 1 share; confidence is modest given no historical edge data and only one confirming signal.
